overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest trail. The character travels from a lakeside marsh area into denser woodland with dynamic lighting and atmospheric mist.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path with two swords strapped to his back, moving parallel to a marshy lake

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest with patches of grass
calm body of water with reeds and grasses along the shoreline
tall pine trees forming a dense forest wall
tall pine trees on the opposite side of the lake
moss-covered boulders and rocks among the trees

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a forest trail with a marshy lake visible to the right. The path is surrounded by dense coniferous trees and rocky outcrops, with morning mist creating a hazy atmosphere. The lighting is soft and diffused through the tree canopy.

events.description: path enters denser tree cover, lighting becomes significantly darker as canopy blocks sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path deeper into the forest interior, away from the water

entered.detail: thick overhead tree cover creating dark shadows on the path

segments.scene_description: The trail moves away from the lake into a denser section of forest. The canopy becomes thicker, blocking much of the sunlight and creating a darker, more enclosed atmosphere. Large boulders and rocky undergrowth appear along the path edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with mixed vegetation and rocky outcrops

events.description: emerging from dense cover, sunlight becomes more direct on the path creating dappled lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the sun-dappled forest path as the terrain becomes more varied with rocky outcrops

entered.detail: rocky terrain rising up through the trees on the right side
fallen or standing dead tree with bare branches
mountain peak visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path opens up slightly with more sunlight filtering through the trees. Rocky hillsides become visible on the right, and a distant mountain peak appears through the forest. The vegetation becomes more mixed with grassy clearings and dead tree trunks scattered along the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail that transitions from a misty lakeside marsh into a dense woodland and finally toward an open mountain vista. It begins with Geralt walking beside a marshy lake under a soft, diffused morning light that filters through coniferous trees and hazy mist. As the trail moves away from the water, the canopy thickens and the atmosphere grows darker and more enclosed, with large boulders and rocky undergrowth crowding the path. The scene then opens up as sunlight begins to filter through the trees again, shifting the terrain toward grassy clearings scattered with dead trunks. Finally, the camera reveals rocky hillsides to the right and a distant mountain peak emerging through the forest.
